label: PASS
rationale: Descriptor returns required Version 0x02, Length 0x20, processing bit 0 with no data-removal operation in progress, and mechanism bit 2 set with reserved bits clear.

label: FAIL
rationale: The descriptor Version is 1, but the Opal descriptor table requires Version 0x02 for Feature Code 0x0404.

label: PASS
rationale: Descriptor values match the required Version 0x02 and Length 0x20; processing is 0 with no operation in progress, and Crypto Erase bit 2 is present.

label: FAIL
rationale: The descriptor Length is 31, but the Supported Data Removal Mechanism Feature descriptor requires Length 0x20.

label: PASS
rationale: The response has required Version 0x02, Length 0x20, no processing operation indicated, and SupportedDataRemovalMechanism includes mandatory Crypto Erase bit 2 only.

label: FAIL
rationale: The processing bit is 1 even though the trajectory shows no Revert, RevertSP, GenKey, or restarted in-progress data-removal operation.

label: PASS
rationale: The descriptor matches Version 0x02 and Length 0x20, reports processing 0 outside an active data-removal operation, and includes required Crypto Erase support.

label: FAIL
rationale: SupportedDataRemovalMechanism is 0, so mandatory Crypto Erase bit 2 is not set.

label: PASS
rationale: Mechanism value 36 sets required Crypto Erase bit 2 and optional vendor-specific bit 5 while leaving reserved bits 3, 4, 6, and 7 clear.

label: FAIL
rationale: Mechanism value 68 sets reserved bit 6; reserved bits 3-4 and 6-7 are not valid supported mechanisms and must remain zero.

label: PASS
rationale: After successful GenKey completion, the processing bit is correctly zero; Version, Length, and mandatory Crypto Erase support are also compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: GenKey completed successfully in the trajectory, so the Data Removal Operation Processing bit must be zero, not one.
